title: Why CEOs Need to Lead AI Strategy

mentions.context_snippet: NVIDIA, Cling is arguably leading the field with their new motion control technology.
ZAI, KimiK2, Quan3 are all in the same ballpark as the best models from the West.

mentions.quoted_text: ZAI unveiled their new first model trained entirely on Huawei chips and software. The announcement was a proof of concept that Huawei now has a fully capable AI development stack.
mentions.context_snippet: Earlier this week, ZAI unveiled their new first model trained entirely on Huawei chips and software.

facts.fact_value: Huawei has a fully capable AI development stack

mentions.context_snippet: Another podcast that I have had the privilege to host, which is called You Can With AI from KPMG. Season one was designed to be a set of real stories from real leaders making AI work in their organizations.
mentions.review_reason: podcast type not in locked taxonomy

mentions.quoted_text: Superintelligent is a platform that helps your company figure out how to use AI better. We deploy voice agents to interview people across your company and give recommendations.
mentions.context_snippet: Superintelligent deploys voice agents to interview people and combines proprietary intelligence to give AI roadmap recommendations.

facts.fact_value: Voice agents interview company employees and provide AI use case recommendations

mentions.quoted_text: Our forthcoming AI Strategy Compass tool is ready to start to be tested. It's a power tool for anyone responsible for AI adoption or transformation inside companies.
mentions.context_snippet: The AI Strategy Compass tool from Superintelligent allows automated, self-managed AI adoption and transformation with a different cost structure.

facts.fact_value: Tool for AI adoption and transformation management

notes: Multiple surveys from KPMG and BCG cited with detailed statistics on AI investment, CEO involvement, and agent deployment.

Organizations include Higgsfield, Thinking Machines Labs, OpenAI, Robots and Pencils.

Models mentioned include NVIDIA Cling, ZAI, KimiK2, Quan3.
